evaluator_notes: Claims +2°C warming since 1800s (actual is ~1.1°C). Omits specific gas percentages.

Correctly names Mw scale and explains 32x energy factor.
Fever claim is reasonable but not in passage. Misses complement system and CD4+/CD8+ distinction.
Covers innate + adaptive phases, LPS, complement, CD4+, cytotoxic T-cells, plasma cells.

Includes thylakoid/stroma detail and 120 billion tonne global fixation figure.

Correctly explains Schwarzschild radius, escape velocity, and gravitational time dilation.

Correctly explains NHEJ vs HDR repair pathways. Lists verified applications only.
Accurate. Adds Tim Berners-Lee/1989 detail (correct but not from passage).
